en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO MUTH-LABBEN. A PSALM OF DAVID. I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart; I will recount all of your wonderful deeds.
zh: 耶和華啊！我要全心稱謝你， 我要述說你一切奇妙的作為。

en: I will be glad and exult in you; I will sing praise to your name, O Most High.
zh: 我要因你快樂歡欣； 至高者啊！我要歌頌你的名。

en: When my enemies turn back, they stumble and perish before your presence.
zh: 我的仇敵轉身退後的時候， 就在你的面前絆倒、滅亡。

en: For you have maintained my just cause; you have sat on the throne, giving righteous judgment.
zh: 因為你為我伸了冤，辨了屈； 你坐在寶座上，施行公義的審判。

en: You have rebuked the nations; you have made the wicked perish; you have blotted out their name forever and ever.
zh: 你斥責了列國，滅絕了惡人； 你塗抹了他們的名，直到永永遠遠。

en: The enemy came to an end in everlasting ruins; their cities you rooted out; the very memory of them has perished.
zh: 仇敵的結局到了，他們遭毀滅， 直到永遠； 你拆毀他們的城鎮，使它們湮沒無聞。

en: But the LORD sits enthroned forever; he has established his throne for justice,
zh: 耶和華卻永遠坐著為王， 為了施行審判，他已經設立寶座。

en: and he judges the world with righteousness; he judges the peoples with uprightness.
zh: 他必以公義審判世界， 按正直判斷萬民。

en: The LORD is a stronghold for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble.
zh: 耶和華要給受欺壓的人作保障， 作患難時的避難所。

en: And those who know your name put their trust in you, for you, O LORD, have not forsaken those who seek you.
zh: 認識你名的人必倚靠你； 耶和華啊！你從未撇棄尋求你的人。

en: Sing praises to the LORD, who sits enthroned in Zion! Tell among the peoples his deeds!
zh: 你們要歌頌住在錫安的耶和華， 要在萬民中傳揚他的作為。

en: For he who avenges blood is mindful of them; he does not forget the cry of the afflicted.
zh: 因為那追討流人血的罪的，他記念受苦的人， 他沒有忘記他們的哀求。

en: Be gracious to me, O LORD! See my affliction from those who hate me, O you who lift me up from the gates of death,
zh: 耶和華啊！求你恩待我， 看看那些恨我的人加給我的苦難； 求你把我從死門拉上來，

en: that I may recount all your praises, that in the gates of the daughter of Zion I may rejoice in your salvation.
zh: 好叫我述說你一切可稱頌的事， 並在錫安的城門 因你的救恩歡樂。

en: The nations have sunk in the pit that they made; in the net that they hid their own foot has been caught.
zh: 列國陷入自己挖掘的坑中， 他們的腳在自己暗設的網裡纏住了。

en: The LORD has made himself known; he has executed judgment; the wicked are snared in the work of their own hands. Higgaion. Selah
zh: 耶和華已經把自己顯明，又施行了審判； 惡人被自己手所作的纏住了。

en: The wicked shall return to Sheol, all the nations that forget God.
zh: 惡人都必歸到陰間， 忘記 神的列國都必滅亡。

en: For the needy shall not always be forgotten, and the hope of the poor shall not perish forever.
zh: 但貧窮的人必不會被永遠遺忘， 困苦人的希望也必不會永久落空。

en: Arise, O LORD! Let not man prevail; let the nations be judged before you!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你起來，不要讓世人得勝； 願列國都在你面前受審判。

en: Put them in fear, O LORD! Let the nations know that they are but men! Selah
zh: 耶和華啊！求你使他們驚懼， 願列國都知道自己不過是人。
